film.title: Detective Byomkesh Bakshy!
film.overview: Byomkesh, fresh out of college, agrees to investigate the disappearance of Bhuvan, a chemist. Assisted by Bhuvan's son Ajit, Byomkesh links the case to a larger conspiracy that will unsettle Calcutta.

dialogues.dialogue: Be careful Your help has no sense. I'll wait outside You felt no shame stealing from a woman's bag......so why be ashamed looking at her in her bath? Give me one Don't get jumpy. It's only a cigarette
This map...This map looks familiar. How did the volunteer have it? You should've been my father's son He was ashamed of me I wanted to write I was the shy skinny type
dialogues.cause_raw: not living up to father's expectations

dialogues.dialogue: Our first famous boarder Read it A sensational murder and blackmail case was solved by Bengal's pride..."...the brave talented young detective Byomkesh Bakshy" Why did the paper come so late? Late? It's the usual time
dialogues.cause_raw: solving a sensational murder and blackmail case
